Kadir Has University

Psychology

Kadir Has University Department of Psychology aims to provide students with in-depth knowledge of the basic theories and applications of psychology. The department is accredited by the Turkish Psychological Association for 5 years as of June 2021. The undergraduate programme is supported by applied courses, enabling students to gain practical skills. In addition, students' academic and social development is encouraged through various research laboratories and club activities.
